body_txt: Great news, Page! I'm giving you a promotion! Your new title is Trope Page, as opposed to your old role of Blank Page. Now the pay's the same and there are no perks, but you will be expected to keep discussions, indexes, and a good example list. It's a new responsibility. Keep at it and you may get moved up later, but for now you need to put in the extra time, this is a great opportunity for you! There are a great many names for this: in Real Life and in fictional office settings they call it being a Team Leader . In the military they call it a Brevet or acting rank, you get the authority and whatnot of the promotion, but not the money. Happened a lot in Real Life in The American Civil War and the World Wars and still happens to this day to an extent if a unit is short on personnel. Think of it as the opposite of being Kicked Upstairs , you stay right where you are but do more work without getting paid extra for it! Oh, and I need you to file these examples too.
